creator: nakaji@tutrp.tut.ac.jp
text:
pkg_remove is a perl script written by SADA-san 
<sada@rr.IIJ4U.OR.JP>.

It can remove packages in proper order.

Fix: 

Shell archive file has already been posted to ports-jp
mailing list, which is available at 
http://home.jp.FreeBSD.org/cgi-bin/showmail/ports-jp/8523
or
http://www.heimat.gr.jp/~nakaji/FreeBSD/ports/pkg_remove.shar
The latter is a shell archive file itself.
How-To-Repeat: Nothing.
